not_claimed: device-path simulation gateway v1 fully proven
source_truth_mode_note: This is narrower than device_path_simulation. It proves a controlled SenML fixture gateway path, not a fuller device-path simulator.
completion_review_status_note: The existing completion review remains implementation_ready_for_review and final_status remains not_started until merge, final tag, and closure patch are completed.
recommended_next_strengthening: A later P51 hardening patch or P52 should add at least 24 packs, at least 2 devices, duplicate behavior, ingestion window records, traceability readback, and clock skew reporting.
